news.t: With Intelligence Honors Thornburg with Two 2026 Mutual Fund & ETF Awards
Thornburg Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two Fixed Income ETFs
Thornburg Launches Its First Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TXUG is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.84%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 6.18%, HOYA Corporation at 5.67%, AstraZeneca at 4.37%, and Air Liquide at 3.82%.

overview.description: The Thornburg International Growth Fund ETF (TXUG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to developed markets ex-US equities with growth characteristics. TXUG was launched on Jan 23, 2025 and is issued by Thornburg.
